reasoning: The control AC-2 (13) focuses on disabling accounts for high-risk individuals. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to RBAC by ensuring that high-risk users do not have access to sensitive roles or bindings. This involves disabling or revoking access for service accounts or users identified as high-risk, and implementing policies to regularly review and manage user access.
title: Account Management | Disable Accounts for High-risk Individuals
